rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LEONARD ALLAN HARRISON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. No courtesy copy of the Report of Status of Administration (filed on 7/28/17) has been provided. Further, no notice has been given on the new report, and the report itself indicated that a final distribution petition would be filed by early September, which it has not. Further, the notice that was filed did not contain language required under Probate Code 12201, despite the attorney's representation in court that it did.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE YUEN YEE GEE DATED DECEMBER 18, 2015 LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Reformation Of Trust
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/17/17. A filed stamped courtesy paper copy of any petition filed conventionally to initiate a case needed to have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T, 14.91F]. Filed stamped copy must be delivered to Room 202 no later than 6 court days prior to continued hearing date, along with a proposed order. It is also noted that Exhibit A of the Trust has not been filed to show that the subject real property is a trust asset.
